messages.content: Across the last 7 days, list each decision discussed. Under each, bullet the supporting arguments and opposing arguments with speaker tags when possible.

Here’s a rundown of every decision that came up in your lifelogs over the past week, with the key pros and cons (speaker tags where available):

1. Decision: Make shakshuka  
   • Supporting  
     – Unknown: “بدي اعمل شكشوكه” (“I want to make shakshuka”).  
   • Opposing  
     – No objections surfaced in the recording.

2. Decision: Technology platform for the new training academy (custom build vs. third-party service)  
   • Supporting a custom build  
     – Unknown: “Your preference is to integrate AI tools” (arguing for tighter AI integration in a bespoke platform).  
   • Opposing use of a third-party service  
     – Unknown: “or use an existing third party service” (raising the option of faster deployment/less upfront dev).

3. Decision: Hybrid work schedule – choosing in-office day  
   • Supporting office on Thursday  
     – You: “اثنين ولا خميس انت بدك؟” (“Monday or Thursday, which do you want?”)  
     – Unknown: “خميس.” (“Thursday.”)  
   • Opposing office on Monday  
     – Unknown: “لا خميس.” (“No, Thursday.”) implicitly rejecting Monday.

4. Decision: Focus on front-end work and check in with colleague  
   • Supporting  
     – Unknown: “اذا لسه الشغل الاساس على الفرونت … لازم احكي معها اشوف هي شصارت” (“Since the core work is on the front-end, we need to talk to her to see where things stand.”)  
   • Opposing / Caveat  
     – Unknown: “يا صاحبي مشكله” (“Buddy, there’s a problem.”) indicating blockers.

5. Decision: Build the e-learning platform using Laravel + Supabase  
   • Supporting Laravel/Supabase choice  
     – You: “سدر هي بلاتفورما ل … بلاتفورما ليرنينج” (“Seder [Laravel] is a learning platform framework.”)  
     – You: “اسمع شو تعمل اعمل لافل سوبر بيس” (“Listen: set up Laravel + Supabase.”)  
   • Opposing / Questions  
     – Unknown: “تعمل ايه؟” (“What exactly should I build?”)  
     – Unknown: “ايش هرش؟” (“What is it scraping?”) showing some confusion around requirements.

6. Decision: Adopt “Manos” as a research tool  
   • Supporting  
     – You: “هسا بدي اياك تبلش تستعمل مانوس … بيساعد” (“I want you to start using Manos—it really helps.”)  
   • Opposing / Clarification needed  
     – Unknown: “ايش هرش؟” (“What’s it scraping?”) asking for more detail on how Manos works.

summary:
Decision Analysis: 7 Days
User: Decisions, arguments
